policyitem.name: SuperRed Open Source Organization Co., Ltd.

filteritem.name: LICENSE
filteritem.desc: license file

filteritem.name: wukong100/cfg/fstab.uis7885
filteritem.desc: 配置文件，不能加其他注释

filefilter.desc: Filters for compatibility, license header policies

filteritem.desc: ws73 client test文件

filteritem.name: *.a|*.so|*.bin|*.img|*.db|*.p7s
filteritem.desc: Temp files

filteritem.desc: Upstream closed-source lib dependency, keep as-is
